# @verevoir/accounts

> Multi-user accounts, team membership, and invitations. The tenancy and billing boundary for SaaS applications. Zero runtime dependencies.

## Install

```bash
npm install @verevoir/accounts
```

## Core Exports

### Account Store

```typescript
import { createAccountStore, acceptInvitation } from '@verevoir/accounts';

const store = createAccountStore({ storage: myStorageAdapter });

// Create an account — creator becomes owner
const account = await store.createAccount('Acme Corp', 'user-1');

// Query members
const members = await store.getMembers(account.id);
// [{ accountId, userId: 'user-1', role: 'owner', joinedAt }]

// Add a member
await store.addMember(account.id, 'user-2', 'admin');

// Change role
await store.setMemberRole(account.id, 'user-2', 'member');

// Remove (cannot remove owner)
await store.removeMember(account.id, 'user-2');

// List all accounts a user belongs to
const memberships = await store.getMemberships('user-1');
```

### Invitations

```typescript
// Create invitation
const inv = await store.createInvitation(
  account.id,
  'alice@example.com',
  'admin',
  'user-1',       // invitedBy
  'tok-abc',       // token (consumer generates)
  expiresAt,       // seconds since epoch
);

// Accept invitation
const { invitation, member } = await acceptInvitation(store, 'tok-abc', 'user-alice');
// invitation.status === 'accepted'
// member.role === 'admin'

// Revoke
await store.updateInvitationStatus(inv.id, 'revoked');
```

## Types

```typescript
type MemberRole = 'owner' | 'admin' | 'member';
type InvitationStatus = 'pending' | 'accepted' | 'expired' | 'revoked';

interface Account {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  createdAt: number;
}

interface Member {
  accountId: string;
  userId: string;
  role: MemberRole;
  joinedAt: number;
}

interface Invitation {
  id: string;
  accountId: string;
  email: string;
  role: MemberRole;
  token: string;
  status: InvitationStatus;
  invitedBy: string;
  createdAt: number;
  expiresAt: number;
  acceptedBy?: string;
}
```

## Constraints

- StorageAdapter is structural typing — no import from @verevoir/storage
- Invitation tokens are provided by the consumer
- Owner cannot be removed from an account
